member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Clouds
member.summary: Represents the cloud coverage portion of a current weather response.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Clouds.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance from the supplied JSON token.
member.param: The JSON fragment that contains the cloudiness value.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Clouds.Cloudiness
member.summary: Cloudiness, %

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Coordinates
member.summary: Represents the coordinate payload returned from the OpenWeather current weather response.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Coordinates.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from raw JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token containing the coordinate fields.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Coordinates.Longitude
member.summary: City geo location, longitude

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Coordinates.Latitude
member.summary: City geo location, latitude

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather
member.summary: An object that provides current weather data

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a JSON response.
member.param: The raw JSON returned by the weather API.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Coordinates
member.summary: Gets the coordinates associated with the weather reading.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Weather
member.summary: Gets the collection of high-level weather descriptors.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Base
member.summary: Gets the OpenWeather base station identifier.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Main
member.summary: Gets the temperature and pressure readings.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Visibility
member.summary: Gets the visibility distance in meters when available.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Wind
member.summary: Gets the wind data for the reading.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Clouds
member.summary: Gets the cloud coverage information.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Rain
member.summary: Gets the rainfall totals.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Snow
member.summary: Gets the snowfall totals.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Sys
member.summary: Gets the system metadata values.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.TimezoneOffset
member.summary: UTC (+/-) hour/s

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.Timezone
member.summary: Gets the timezone name returned by the API.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.CityID
member.summary: Gets the city identifier assigned by OpenWeather.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.City
member.summary: Gets the city name associated with the reading.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.CurrentWeather.StatusCode
member.summary: Gets the HTTP-like status code when an error occurs.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Main
member.summary: Represents the primary temperature- and pressure-related section of the weather payload.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Main.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the main weather metrics.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.Temperature
member.summary: Temperature. Default Unit: Celsius

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.FeelsLike
member.summary: Temperature. This temperature parameter accounts for the human perception of weather. Default Unit: Celsius

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.TemperatureMin
member.summary: Minimum temperature at the moment. This is minimal currently observed temperature (within large megalopolises and urban areas). Default Unit: Celsius

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.TemperatureMax
member.summary: Maximum temperature at the moment. This is maximal currently observed temperature (within large megalopolises and urban areas). Default Unit: Celsius

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.Pressure
member.summary: Atmospheric pressure (on the sea level, if there is no SeaLevel or GroundLevel data), hPa

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.Humidity
member.summary: Humidity, %

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.SeaLevel
member.summary: Atmospheric pressure on the sea level, hPa

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.GroundLevel
member.summary: Atmospheric pressure on the ground level, hPa

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Main.DewPoint
member.summary: Dew point temperature in Celsius.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Rain
member.summary: Represents precipitation data for the current weather response.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Rain.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token containing rain volume metrics.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Rain.OneHour
member.summary: Rain volume for the last 1 hour, mm

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Rain.ThreeHours
member.summary: Rain volume for the last 3 hours, mm

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Snow
member.summary: Represents snowfall data for the current weather response.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Snow.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that holds snow metrics.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Snow.OneHour
member.summary: Snow volume for the last 1 hour, mm

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Snow.ThreeHours
member.summary: Snow volume for the last 3 hour, mm

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Sys
member.summary: Encapsulates system level metadata returned by the current weather API.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Sys.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the system information.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.Type
member.summary: Internal parameter returned by OpenWeather.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.ID
member.summary: Unique identifier for the system block.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.Country
member.summary: Country code (ISO 3166) of the location.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.Sunrise
member.summary: A DateTime object representing sunrise time converted to your local time

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.SunriseTime
member.summary: Time of sunrise in the format HH:mm

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.Sunset
member.summary: A DateTime object representing sunset time converted to your local time

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Sys.SunsetTime
member.summary: Time of sunset in the format HH:mm

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.WeatherIconResolution
member.summary: Describes the pixel density variants supported by OpenWeather icon assets.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.WeatherIconResolution.Standard
member.summary: Standard 1x icon (approximately 50x50 px).

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.WeatherIconResolution.DoubleScale
member.summary: High-DPI 2x icon for Retina/HiDPI displays.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.WeatherIconResolution.Quadruple
member.summary: Ultra-high-definition 4x icon.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Weather
member.summary: Represents a single entry from the OpenWeather weather collection.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Weather.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a JSON token.
member.param: The JSON array that contains the weather description.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Weather.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new, empty instance of the class.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Weather.ID
member.summary: Weather condition ID

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Weather.Main
member.summary: Group of weather parameters (Rain, Snow, Extreme etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Weather.Description
member.summary: Weather condition within the group

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Weather.Icon
member.summary: Weather icon ID

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Weather.GetIconUrl(SimpleWeather.WeatherIconResolution)
member.summary: Builds the CDN URL for this weather icon using the documented OpenWeather pattern.
member.param: Desired image scale (1x, 2x, or 4x).
member.returns: The full icon URL or null when the icon code is unavailable.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Wind
member.summary: Represents the wind section of the current weather response, including derived directions.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Wind.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token containing wind metrics.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Wind.Speed
member.summary: Wind speed. Default Unit: meter/sec

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Wind.Degree
member.summary: Wind direction, degrees (meteorological)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Wind.WindDirectionShort
member.summary: Short wind direction represented by a string (N, E, S, W, etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Wind.WindDirectionLong
member.summary: Long wind direction represented by a string (North, East, South, West, etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Wind.Gust
member.summary: Wind gust. Default Unit: meter/sec

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Wind.GetWindDirectionShort(System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Converts a numeric wind bearing into the corresponding short compass representation.
member.param: The meteorological wind degree.
member.returns: The short direction token (e.g., N, NW).

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Wind.GetWindDirectionLong(System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Converts a numeric wind bearing into the corresponding long compass representation.
member.param: The meteorological wind degree.
member.returns: The long direction token (e.g., North, Northwest).

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator
member.summary: Provides helper methods for interacting with the OpenWeather geocoding APIs.
member.param: Optional API key used when issuing HTTP requests.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Provides helper methods for interacting with the OpenWeather geocoding APIs.
member.param: Optional API key used when issuing HTTP requests.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator.GetCitiesByNameAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves up to five matching cities based on name, state, and country filters.
member.param: The city name to look up.
Optional ISO state code used for disambiguation.
Optional ISO country code used for disambiguation.
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A list of raw city payloads returned by the API.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator.GetCoordinatesByCityNameAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the first set of coordinates that matches the supplied city filters.
member.param: The city name to look up.
Optional ISO state code used for disambiguation.
Optional ISO country code used for disambiguation.
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A when a city is found; otherwise null.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator.GetCoordinatesByPostCodeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves coordinates by postal or ZIP code.
member.param: The postal or ZIP code.
The ISO country code the postal code belongs to.
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A when a match is found; otherwise null.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator.GetCityNameByCoordinatesAsync(SimpleWeather.LatLong,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Looks up the city name for the supplied coordinate pair.
member.param: The latitude and longitude to reverse geocode.
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: The city name when available; otherwise null.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoLocator.GetCityNameByCoordinatesAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Looks up the city name for the supplied latitude/longitude pair.
member.param: The latitude to reverse geocode.
The longitude to reverse geocode.
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: The city name when available; otherwise null.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.GeoUtils
member.summary: Contains helpers for extracting coordinate data from JSON payloads.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.GeoUtils.GetCoordinatesFromJToken(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Converts a JSON token containing lat and lon fields into a instance.
member.param: The JSON token that includes latitude and longitude.
member.returns: The converted value.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures
member.summary: Describes feature flags representing OpenWeather API surface areas that may be available depending on the user's plan and configuration.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.None
member.summary: No features are available.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.CurrentWeather
member.summary: Access to current weather endpoints.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.Forecast5
member.summary: Access to the 5 day / 3 hour forecast endpoint.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.OneCall
member.summary: Access to One Call endpoints.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.OneCallHourly
member.summary: Access to One Call hourly forecast data.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.OneCallDaily
member.summary: Access to One Call daily forecast data.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.Alerts
member.summary: Access to weather alerts.

member.name: F:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures.Geocoding
member.summary: Access to geocoding endpoints.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities
member.summary: Represents the effective OpenWeather capabilities available to the application. This includes which API features can be used and any associated limits.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The set of available OpenWeather feature flags.
The maximum number of forecast days supported by the plan.
The time-step between forecast entries supported by the plan.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.#ctor(SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures,System.Int32,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Represents the effective OpenWeather capabilities available to the application. This includes which API features can be used and any associated limits.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The set of available OpenWeather feature flags.
The maximum number of forecast days supported by the plan.
The time-step between forecast entries supported by the plan.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.Features
member.summary: Gets the set of OpenWeather feature flags available to the application.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.MaxForecastDays
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of forecast days supported by the current plan.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.ForecastStep
member.summary: Gets the time-step between forecast entries provided by the supported forecast endpoint.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.Has(SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherFeatures)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the specified flag(s) are available.
member.param: The feature flag(s) to test for.
member.returns: if all requested feature flag(s) are available; otherwise, .

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.PaidOneCall
member.summary: Gets the capability preset for paid plans using One Call.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.OpenWeatherCapabilities.Free
member.summary: Gets the capability preset for the free plan using the 5 day / 3 hour forecast endpoint.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.LatLong
member.summary: Represents a coordinate pair expressed in decimal degrees.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.LatLong.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Represents a coordinate pair expressed in decimal degrees.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.LatLong.Latitude
member.summary: Gets the latitude component in decimal degrees.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.LatLong.Longitude
member.summary: Gets the longitude component in decimal degrees.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Utility
member.summary: Provides helper extension-style methods for optional JSON extraction.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Utility.OptDouble(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to read a JSON token as a returning null when parsing fails.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the data.
The JSON path of the desired attribute.
member.returns: The parsed double value or null if it cannot be parsed.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Utility.OptInt(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to read a JSON token as an returning null when parsing fails.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the data.
The JSON path of the desired attribute.
member.returns: The parsed integer value or null if it cannot be parsed.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Alerts
member.summary: Represents a single weather alert returned by the One Call API.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Alerts.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the alert information.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Alerts.SenderName
member.summary: Gets the source agency issuing the alert.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Alerts.Event
member.summary: Gets the alert event name.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Alerts.Start
member.summary: Gets the local start time of the alert window.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Alerts.End
member.summary: Gets the local end time of the alert window.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Alerts.Description
member.summary: Gets the textual description of the alert.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Alerts.Tags
member.summary: Gets the raw tags supplied by the API.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Current
member.summary: Represents the current weather block returned by the One Call API.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Current.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the current weather values.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.DT
member.summary: Gets the timestamp of this reading converted to local time.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Sunrise
member.summary: Gets the sunrise time associated with the reading.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Sunset
member.summary: Gets the sunset time associated with the reading.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Temperature
member.summary: Gets the ambient temperature.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.FeelsLike
member.summary: Gets the feels-like temperature that accounts for humidity and wind.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Pressure
member.summary: Gets the sea-level atmospheric pressure in hPa.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Humidity
member.summary: Gets the relative humidity percentage.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.DewPoint
member.summary: Gets the dew point temperature.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Clouds
member.summary: Gets the cloud coverage percentage.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Uvi
member.summary: Gets the UV index.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Visibility
member.summary: Gets the visibility distance in meters.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.WindSpeed
member.summary: Gets the wind speed in meters per second.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.WindGust
member.summary: Gets the wind gust speed in meters per second.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.WindDegree
member.summary: Gets the wind direction in meteorological degrees.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.WindDirectionShort
member.summary: Gets the short compass representation for the wind direction.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.WindDirectionLong
member.summary: Gets the long compass representation for the wind direction.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Rain
member.summary: Gets the rainfall totals for the period.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Snow
member.summary: Gets the snowfall totals for the period.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Current.Weather
member.summary: Gets the descriptive weather information.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Daily
member.summary: Represents a single day of forecast data from the One Call API.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Daily.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the daily forecast.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.DT
member.summary: Gets the forecast timestamp converted to local time.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Sunrise
member.summary: Gets the sunrise time for the forecast day.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Sunset
member.summary: Gets the sunset time for the forecast day.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Moonrise
member.summary: Gets the moonrise time for the forecast day.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Moonset
member.summary: Gets the moonset time for the forecast day.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.MoonPhase
member.summary: Moon phase

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Temperature
member.summary: Gets the day-parted temperatures.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.FeelsLike
member.summary: Gets the day-parted feels-like temperatures.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Pressure
member.summary: Gets the sea-level atmospheric pressure in hPa.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Humidity
member.summary: Gets the relative humidity percentage.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.DewPoint
member.summary: Gets the dew point temperature.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.WindSpeed
member.summary: Wind speed. Default Unit: meter/sec

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.WindGust
member.summary: Wind gust. Default Unit: meter/sec

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.WindDegree
member.summary: Wind direction, degrees (meteorological)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.WindDirectionShort
member.summary: Short wind direction represented by a string (N, E, S, W, etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.WindDirectionLong
member.summary: Long wind direction represented by a string (North, East, South, West, etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Clouds
member.summary: Gets the cloud coverage percentage.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Uvi
member.summary: Gets the UV index.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.PrecipitationProbability
member.summary: Probability of precipitation in percents. The values of the parameter vary between 0 and 100

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Rain
member.summary: Gets the total rainfall in millimeters.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Snow
member.summary: Gets the total snowfall in millimeters.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Daily.Weather
member.summary: Gets the descriptive weather information.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.FeelsLike
member.summary: Represents the perceived temperature for each part of the day in the daily forecast.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.FeelsLike.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the feels-like values.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.FeelsLike.Morning
member.summary: Morning feels-like temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.FeelsLike.Day
member.summary: Daytime feels-like temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.FeelsLike.Evening
member.summary: Evening feels-like temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.FeelsLike.Night
member.summary: Night feels-like temperature in Celsius.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Hourly
member.summary: Represents a single hourly forecast entry from the One Call API.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Hourly.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the hourly forecast.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.DT
member.summary: Time of the forecasted data, UTC

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Temperature
member.summary: Temperature

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.FeelsLike
member.summary: Temperature. This accounts for the human perception of weather.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Pressure
member.summary: Atmospheric pressure on the sea level, hPa

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Humidity
member.summary: Humidity, %

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.DewPoint
member.summary: Atmospheric temperature (varying according to pressure and humidity) below which water droplets begin to condense and dew can form.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Uvi
member.summary: UV index

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Clouds
member.summary: Cloudiness, %

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Visibility
member.summary: Visibility in meters.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.WindSpeed
member.summary: Wind speed. Default Unit: meter/sec

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.WindGust
member.summary: Wind gust. Default Unit: meter/sec

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.WindDegree
member.summary: Wind direction, degrees (meteorological)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.WindDirectionShort
member.summary: Short wind direction represented by a string (N, E, S, W, etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.WindDirectionLong
member.summary: Long wind direction represented by a string (North, East, South, West, etc.)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.PrecipitationProbability
member.summary: Probability of precipitation in percents. The values of the parameter vary between 0 and 100

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Rain
member.summary: Gets the rainfall totals for the hour.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Snow
member.summary: Gets the snowfall totals for the hour.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Hourly.Weather
member.summary: Gets the descriptive weather information.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.Temperature
member.summary: Represents the temperature readings for each part of the day in the daily forecast.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.Temperature.#ctor(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from JSON data.
member.param: The JSON token that contains the temperature values.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Temperature.Morning
member.summary: Morning temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Temperature.Day
member.summary: Daytime temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Temperature.Evening
member.summary: Evening temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Temperature.Night
member.summary: Night temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Temperature.Min
member.summary: Minimum daily temperature in Celsius.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.Temperature.Max
member.summary: Maximum daily temperature in Celsius.

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast
member.summary: An object that provides weather forecast data

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a JSON response.
member.param: The raw JSON returned by the One Call API.

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Latitude
member.summary: Geographical coordinates of the location (latitude)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Longitude
member.summary: Geographical coordinates of the location (longitude)

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Timezone
member.summary: Timezone name for the requested location

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.TimezoneOffset
member.summary: Shift in hours from UTC

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Current
member.summary: Current weather data as an object

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Hourly
member.summary: Hourly forecast weather data as a list of objects containing the data for each hour

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Daily
member.summary: Daily forecast weather data as a list of objects containing the data for each day

member.name: P:SimpleWeather.WeatherForecast.Alerts
member.summary: A list of objects containing National weather alerts data from major national weather warning systems

member.name: T:SimpleWeather.WeatherController
member.summary: Provides high level weather APIs backed by the OpenWeather One Call endpoints.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Optional OpenWeather API key used for authenticated requests.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetCurrentWeatherAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an object that contains all the relevant data for the current weather in a given city.
member.param: The name of the city
The state code (optional, for US cities)
The country code (optional, e.g. "US", "GB")
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A object for the specified city

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetCurrentWeatherAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an object that contains all the relevant data for the current weather at the specified latitude and longitude.
member.param: Latitude of the location
Longitude of the location
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A object for the specified coordinates

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetCurrentWeatherAsync(SimpleWeather.LatLong,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously gets the current weather for the specified coordinates.
member.param: The coordinates of the location
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation whose result is a for the specified coordinates.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetWeatherForecastAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an object that contains all the relevant weather forecast data for a given city.
member.param: The name of the city
The state code (optional, for US cities)
The country code (optional, e.g. "US", "GB")
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A object for the specified city

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetWeatherForecastAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an object that contains all the relevant weather forecast data for a given latitude and longitude.
member.param: Latitude of the location
Longitude of the location
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A object for the specified coordinates

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetWeatherForecastAsync(SimpleWeather.LatLong,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously gets the weather forecast for the specified coordinates.
member.param: The coordinates of the location
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation whose result is a for the specified coordinates.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetCurrentWeatherByPostCodeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an object that contains all the relevant data for the current weather at the specified postal/zip code and country code.
member.param: The postal or zip code
The country code (e.g. "US", "GB")
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A object for the specified postal/zip code

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.GetWeatherForecastByPostCodeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an object that contains all the relevant weather forecast data for the specified postal/zip code and country code.
member.param: The postal or zip code
The country code (e.g. "US", "GB")
Units of measurement. Standard, metric, and imperial units are available. Default is "metric"
Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A object for the specified postal/zip code

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the underlying instance and suppresses finalization.

member.name: M:SimpleWeather.WeatherController.ProbeCapabilitiesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Probes the available capabilities of the OpenWeather API for the configured API key.
member.param: Token used to cancel the HTTP request.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation whose result is an instance indicating the available capabilities.
